title: Reindeer
tileHint: High snowy ridge with a lone spruce tree

1.hint: Ask if Lumi can come with you as your companion.
1.successBody: The old herder studies you for a long moment, then nods. Lumi lowers her head, steps close, and decides your road is one she is willing to share.
1.failureTitle: A promise kept for another winter
1.failureBody: The old herder smiles sadly and says Lumi is not ready to leave him yet. Even so, he shares a little of the old song and sends you away with warmer courage.

2.hint: Leave him a little warmth and wish him well.
2.successBody: You share what small comfort and patience you can. The old herder presses a small silver charm into your hand in return and blesses your road.
2.failureTitle: A quiet gift left in the snow
2.failureBody: You leave what you can and ask for nothing back. The old herder thanks you with the kind of warmth that stays longer than trade.

3.hint: Offer to stay the night and help him tomorrow.
3.successTitle: A warm night under old songs
3.successBody: You stay, mend the fire, and hear the old songs all the way through. By morning the snow feels lighter, and Lumi noses your mitten as if the choice has already been made.
3.failureBody: You stay the night and help as best you can. Lumi does not leave with you, but the old herder gives you a blessing and a memory bright enough to outlast the cold.

startText:
You crest a small snowy rise and the biting wind suddenly falls quiet.

Under an old snow-heavy spruce tree sits an elderly Nisse. His beard is long and white as fresh powder, his red cap faded from many winters. Beside him stands one thin but calm reindeer doe, watching you with dark clever eyes.

The old one slowly lifts his head and smiles with tired kindness.

"Well now... another small one out in the white. Come sit a while if you have time for an old herder's tale."

start.text: The old herder looks at you warmly, waiting.

choices.label: Sit down and listen to his story
Offer to help with his fire and reindeer
Ask him what happened to the rest of his herd

listen1.text:
He speaks softly while stroking the reindeer's neck.

"Many winters ago a terrible blizzard came. My whole herd ran north following the old songs. I was too weak to follow... Only little Lumi here stayed with me."

choices.label: Share some of your food with them
Sing an old herding song with him

help1.text:
The old Nisse chuckles warmly.

"Help these old bones? The fire is weak and Lumi hasn't found good lichen in days. But I won't say no to kindness from a fellow herder."

choices.label: Give them some of your provisions

ask1.text:
His eyes grow distant for a moment.

"They went north... following the old songs. I was too slow. Only Lumi stayed. She has always had a loyal heart."

choices.label: Share food and ask if Lumi could travel with you
Sing the old calling song to see if Lumi reacts

final.text: The old herder looks at you with soft, hopeful eyes. The moment feels important.

commitChoices.label: Ask if Lumi can come with you as your companion
Leave him a little warmth and wish him well
Offer to stay the night and help him tomorrow
